title: Unspeakable: Beyond the Wall of Sleep
original_title: Unspeakable: Beyond The Wall of Sleep
overview: Renowned oneirologist Ambrose London is requested to appear at Arkham Asylum to study the strange case of dissociative identity disorder in patient James Fhelleps/Joe Slater.
